name: exl-payMyTuition-connector
description: Connector between Ex Libris Alma and Primo and the PayMyTuition payment system

scripts.hosted:package: aws cloudformation package --template ./hosted.yaml --s3-bucket almadtest --output-template hosted.packaged.yaml --region us-east-1 --s3-prefix sam
scripts.hosted:deploy: npm run hosted:package && aws cloudformation deploy --template-file hosted.packaged.yaml --stack-name PayMyTuitionConnectorHosted --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM --region us-east-1
scripts.hosted:describe: aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name PayMyTuitionConnectorHosted --region us-east-1 --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[*].{Key:OutputKey,Value:OutputValue,Description:Description}' --output table

author: Josh Weisman & Braden Hiebert
